pages.title: Dragonborn
pages.text: Scaled. Slightly larger than human. Height 1.08, width 1.05. The only race with an active keybound power.

pages.title: Breath Weapon
pages.text: $(bold)Active.$(/) Press the Origins primary key (default $(o)G$(/)) for a short-range fire-breath cone. Roughly 5 damage, 3-block range, ignites for ~4 seconds. Cooldown: 15 seconds.$(br2)A small HUD bar tracks the cooldown.

pages.title: Passive traits
pages.text: $(bold)Dragon Blood.$(/) Fire damage taken halved. Not full immunity.$(br2)$(bold)Scaled Hide.$(/) +2 armor at all times.$(br2)$(bold)Frostbane.$(/) Freeze damage takes +3 per tick. Avoid powder snow; dress for the cold.
